title: Obsidian Glass Mod
description: Introducing Obsidian Glass: as tough as obsidian, piston-movable for dynamic builds, ideal for fortified shelters.
body:
# 📑 Description

Our Obsidian Glass mod introduces a revolutionary building block to Minecraft, blending the best of both worlds: the unmatched durability of obsidian and the flexibility of glass. This mod is designed for players who seek to enhance their building possibilities, offering a new material that doesn't compromise on strength or aesthetics.

**Remember to install the [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)**

# ⭐️ Features

**Durability of Obsidian**: Obsidian Glass has the same toughness as obsidian, making it resistant to explosions and providing an excellent choice for secure structures.

**Piston Compatibility**: Unlike traditional obsidian, Obsidian Glass can be moved by pistons, allowing for innovative movable constructions and mechanisms.

**Aesthetic Appeal**: It maintains the translucent beauty of glass, offering new creative design opportunities for your builds.

# ⚙️ Recipes

![Recipe of Obsidian Glass](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ff02867250314140ca881c8b673ea51b0fca5b67.png)
